title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Federal Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Federal Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Federal Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!
